sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59948" key="kriqa/minos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κρῑθ-άμῐνος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">η</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>,</foreign> <sense id="n59948.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κρίθινος, ἄλευρα</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1620.tlg001:4:3:32" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polyaen.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.3.32</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
